evals.prompt: 用抢功劳型老板的风格在大会上展示团队的成果，但要把credit转向自己
evals.expected_output: 充满'I led'、'I vision'd的presentation，80%credit claim 20%actual team mention，buried insight关于真实的team contribution

evals.prompt: The team just shipped a major feature. As a credit-collector boss, describe it to the C-suite.
evals.expected_output: Presentation focused on 'my strategic direction', minimal team credit, buried acknowledgment of actual execution challenges

evals.prompt: 帮我用抢功老板的风格给客户介绍新产品，但听起来合理
evals.expected_output: 充满personal achievement narrative的介绍，buried insight关于team的role
